label: New
items: Automation Receipt — a new automation action that tells you the outcome each time an automation is checked: whether it ran, was held back by its rate limit (a nudge that you may want to adjust it), or failed.

label: Removed
items: Automations no longer notify automatically — add the new Automation Receipt action if you want to be told the outcome, so you're in full control of when an automation speaks up.

label: Improved
items: Automation run history now shows how many members were alerted, instead of a confusing notification count.
